title: Implement offhand restriction: detect gun in offhand slot and force drop

reference_files.reason: Offhand restriction rule - gun in offhand is forced to drop, player notified
Core principles - gun cannot be placed in offhand slot

acceptance_criteria: Event listener detects when a gun item (modularshoot:gun) is placed in the offhand slot
When detected, the gun item is removed from offhand and dropped as an item entity at the player's position
Player is notified via chat message or action bar text explaining the gun was dropped (offhand not allowed)
Detection covers all methods of placing item in offhand (F key swap, container GUI shift-click, etc.)
Logic runs on server side (no client-side dependency)
Non-gun items in offhand are not affected
